views.name: TodayView
views.purpose: Daily check-in hub showing today's mood entries as colored cards, streak counter with flame icon, current mood face visualization that changes expression based on latest rating, and a motivational prompt if no check-in yet today

views.name: CalendarView
views.purpose: Month grid calendar where each day cell is colored on a gradient from red (1) through yellow (5) to green (10) based on average mood rating. Tapping a day expands to show that day's entries. Empty days are gray. Includes month navigation arrows.

views.name: TrendsView
views.purpose: Mood analytics with a 30-day line chart of daily average ratings, weekly average comparison bar, emotion distribution pie/ring chart showing most frequent emotions, energy-mood correlation scatter, and computed insights like best day of week and longest streak

views.name: CheckInSheet
views.purpose: Focused mood check-in experience: large animated face that changes expression as user drags the mood slider (1-10), emotion tag selector as horizontal scrollable chips, energy level stepper with battery icon, expandable text area for reflection notes, and save button

viewModelComputedProperties.name: todayEntries
viewModelComputedProperties.description: All entries logged today, sorted by most recent first

viewModelComputedProperties.name: hasCheckedInToday
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Whether at least one mood entry exists for today

viewModelComputedProperties.name: currentStreak
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Number of consecutive days with at least one check-in, counting back from today

viewModelComputedProperties.name: weeklyAverage
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Average mood rating for the current calendar week (Mon-Sun)

viewModelComputedProperties.name: previousWeekAverage
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Average mood rating for last week, used for week-over-week comparison

viewModelComputedProperties.name: weeklyTrend
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Difference between weeklyAverage and previousWeekAverage, positive means improving

viewModelComputedProperties.name: monthlyMoodMap
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Dictionary mapping each date in current month to its average mood rating for calendar heatmap coloring

viewModelComputedProperties.name: emotionCounts
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Frequency count of each emotion across all entries in the last 30 days

viewModelComputedProperties.name: topEmotion
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Most frequently logged emotion in the last 30 days

viewModelComputedProperties.name: dailyAverages
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Last 30 days of daily average mood ratings for the trend line chart

viewModelComputedProperties.name: bestDayOfWeek
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Day of the week with the highest average mood rating historically

dailyGoal.description: Check in at least once per day to maintain streak

domainLogic.streakDefinition: A day counts as active if it has at least one mood entry. Streak is consecutive active days ending at today (or yesterday if today has no entry yet).
domainLogic.trendAnalysis: 7-day rolling average mood compared to previous 7-day period. Show percentage change. Also track energy-mood correlation coefficient over 30 days.
insights: Week-over-week mood trend with arrow indicator (improving/declining/stable)
Best and worst day of the week based on historical averages
Most common emotion with percentage of total check-ins
Streak milestone celebrations (7 days, 30 days, 100 days)
Energy-mood correlation: whether high energy days correlate with better mood
Monthly mood summary comparing this month's average to last month
